title: Starting owner-gated pending-graduations register migration
body: Owner directed that processed owner-gated pending-graduations move into a single file, with no pointers left in old locations. Claim 1bd88d4f opened over the legacy backlog, team-session autonomy buffer, napkin-tail buffer, fiery n2 buffer, new owner-gated register, and continuity surfaces. Scope is migration only; unprocessed pending items stay in their existing buffer.
